## Summary

- [ ] Linked issue (or `N/A`)
- [ ] Summary of changes
- [ ] Component API change type: `additive` / `behavioral change` /
      `breaking` / `N/A`

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix / patch
- [ ] New component or additive public API
- [ ] Component behavior or accessibility change
- [ ] Breaking component contract change
- [ ] Documentation / config only
- [ ] Refactor (no behavior change)

## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run check` passes (lint, typecheck, test, build, export check)
- [ ] No package boundary violations (tokens/styling not duplicated locally)
- [ ] Component tags, exports, props, events, slots, and accessibility behavior
      are unchanged or intentionally classified above
- [ ] Generated output in `dist/` was regenerated via `npm run build` if
      package output changed
- [ ] Docs are updated, or `N/A` is noted below
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md [Unreleased]` updated, or `N/A` is noted below

## Screenshots (if applicable)

## Notes for Reviewers
